metadata.notes:
agent_supports: no
daemon_capability: n/a; driver_capability: n/a
applicable: no ŌĆö agy ships no todo/task-list tool; the antigravity parser has no TodoReconciler path, so the session `tasks` field cannot be populated.

assessment.body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: no
daemon_capability: n/a; driver_capability: n/a
applicable: no

## Reasoning

The `task-list` scenario exercises the task-list-management primitive: the agent maintains a todo/task list inside its OWN session (no child sessions), walking three items `pending ŌåÆ in_progress ŌåÆ completed`, with those items surfacing in the session API's `tasks` field while `SubagentCount` stays 0. The canonical reference implementations are Claude Code's `TaskCreate`/`TaskUpdate` and OpenCode/gemini-cli's whole-list-replace todo tool (`todowrite`/`write_todos`).

### agent_supports: no

The `agy` CLI (v1.0.10) ships **no built-in todo/task-list tool**:

- A whole-token binary scan of `~/.local/bin/agy` for `write_todos`, `update_todos`, `set_tasks`, `todo_write`, `task_list`, `create_task`, `update_plan`, `write_plan` returned ZERO hits.
- The actually-emitted tool universe across the four real sample conversations under `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain/` is only `run_command` and `list_dir`. The full tool registry surfaced in the binary strings is `run_command`, `list_dir`, `read_file`, `write_file`, `edit_file`, `view_file`, `grep_search`, `create_file`, `replace`, `search` ŌĆö a file/shell toolset with NO todo/task tool.
- There IS a `/tasks` slash command in the binary strings, but that is the IDE/REPL's view of background/long-running task EXECUTION, not a model-driven todo-list tool the agent walks pendingŌåÆin_progressŌåÆcompleted; it does not write task items to the transcript, and no transcript line in any sample carries a task-list payload.

No built-in path lets the agent maintain and walk a three-item todo list, so `agent_supports: no`, which freezes the cell regardless of the daemon question.

### daemon_capability: n/a; driver_capability: n/a

Independently, irrlicht's antigravity parser cannot populate the `tasks` field even if a task tool existed. The session `tasks` field is fed exclusively by the tailer's `TaskCreate`/`TaskUpdate` deltas + `TaskSnapshot`, which are produced via `core/pkg/tailer/todo_reconciler.go` ŌĆö and only the claudecode, gemini-cli, and opencode parsers call it (its docstring lists exactly those agents' whole-list todo tools). The antigravity parser (`core/adapters/inbound/agents/antigravity/parser.go`) does NOT reference `TodoReconciler` at all; it emits only `user_message`/`assistant_message`/`function_call_output`/`turn_done` with generic `ToolUse{ID,Name}`. So even if agy emitted a todo tool, irrlicht would record it as an opaque tool use and the `tasks` field would stay empty ŌĆö the load-bearing assertion (three items in `tasks` with subject + status) is unobservable. The route is frozen on the agent pillar; the daemon/driver pillars are n/a.
caveats: agy has a /tasks slash command (background/long-running task EXECUTION view in the REPL), but it is NOT a model-driven todo-list tool the agent walks pendingŌåÆin_progressŌåÆcompleted, and it writes no task-list line to the transcript ŌĆö distinct from the scenario's primitive.
Even if a future agy version added a todo tool, the antigravity parser has no TodoReconciler path, so the daemon `tasks` field would stay empty ŌĆö a second, independent block.

sources.note: No TodoReconciler reference; emits user_message/assistant_message/function_call_output/turn_done with generic ToolUse{ID,Name} only ŌĆö no TaskCreate/TaskUpdate/TaskSnapshot path, so the daemon `tasks` field cannot be populated for antigravity.

Docstring: the session tasks field is fed from whole-list todo snapshots produced ONLY by opencode (todowrite), gemini-cli (write_todos), codex (update_plan); the antigravity parser is not among the callers.

Binary scan (v1.0.10): whole-token grep for write_todos/update_todos/set_tasks/todo_write/task_list/create_task/update_plan/write_plan returned ZERO hits; tool registry strings = run_command/list_dir/read_file/write_file/edit_file/view_file/grep_search/create_file/replace/search ŌĆö no todo/task tool.
Real 39-line agentic sample: only list_dir + run_command tool calls across the whole session; no task-list/todo tool line ever appears.
